hero.subtitle: Branch your conversations, reduce your context.

howItWorks.title: Visual Thinking, Evolved
howItWorks.subtitle: Don't lose your train of thought. Branch off when ideas diverge to keep your workspace clean.

branchAnywhere.title: Branch Anywhere
branchAnywhere.description: Create a new conversation path from any point in your chat. Click the continue button to branch off and explore a different direction—without losing your original thread.

keepContextFocused.title: Keep Context Focused
keepContextFocused.description: Branch as many times as needed to keep each conversation focused. Notice how the UX Decisions branch has context from the start but cannot see the other branches—keeping your token usage low and responses relevant.

controlYourContext.title: Context pruning
controlYourContext.description: Navigate between branches using the sidebar. Toggle individual messages in or out of the AI's context with a single click. This helps prevent hallucination problems and keeps the answers given more reliable.

messages.content: I need help planning a product launch for our new SaaS tool.
I'd be happy to help you plan your SaaS product launch. Let's break this down into key areas: positioning, timeline, channels, and metrics. What's your target audience?
We're targeting small business owners who need project management solutions.
Great target market. For small business owners, I recommend focusing on ease of use and quick time-to-value. Should we start with the messaging strategy or the launch timeline?
Before we continue, I need to review the legal requirements for our terms of service.
For a SaaS product, your Terms of Service should cover: data handling, liability limitations, subscription terms, and cancellation policies. Do you have existing legal templates?
We have a basic template but need to add GDPR compliance sections.
Let's work on the landing page copy for the launch.
For your landing page, I suggest leading with the pain point: "Stop juggling spreadsheets." Then highlight your key differentiator. What makes your tool unique?
We have AI-powered task prioritization that learns from user behavior.
I want to discuss the onboarding experience for new users.
For SaaS onboarding, the goal is to get users to their "aha moment" quickly. For a project management tool, that's usually creating their first project. Want to map out the steps?

features.title: System Components
features.subtitle: Every module designed for the branching paradigm.

branchAnywhere.title: Branch Anywhere
branchAnywhere.description: Create new conversation paths from any message. Explore alternatives without losing your original thread.

hybridContext.title: Hybrid Context
hybridContext.description: Control exactly what the AI sees. Add or remove entire branches or specific messages from the AI context window.

lowerTokenSpend.title: Lower Token Spend
lowerTokenSpend.description: Smaller contexts mean faster responses and significantly lower API bills.

splitView.title: Split View
splitView.description: Compare two branches side-by-side. Independent navigation in each pane.

graphExplorer.title: Graph Explorer
graphExplorer.description: Visualize your entire conversation tree. Pan, zoom, and navigate the full structure.

localEncrypted.title: Local & Encrypted
localEncrypted.description: Your data stays on your device. Optional passphrase encryption for sensitive conversations.

items.question: What is branching chat?
items.answer: Bonsai adds a second dimension to your conversations. Traditional chats are linear and one-dimensional—each message follows the last. With branching, you can split off from any point to explore multiple paths simultaneously, turning a single thread into a tree of possibilities.

items.question: Why does context matter?
items.answer: The context window is everything the AI "sees" when generating a response. A larger context means more information for the AI to work with, but it also means higher costs since you pay per token. Even worse, oversized contexts increase the risk of hallucinations as the model struggles to stay coherent across too much information. Bonsai helps you keep context lean and relevant.

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: Yes. Bonsai is local-first—all your conversations are stored in your browser's IndexedDB. Nothing is sent to our servers. You can optionally enable passphrase-based encryption for additional protection.

items.question: Does it work offline?
items.answer: The app itself works offline as a PWA. You can browse, edit, and organize your conversations without internet. Generating new AI responses requires connectivity to the model API.

items.question: Which models are supported?
items.answer: Bonsai integrates with NanoGPT, giving you access to a vast number of models including OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc. Use one model for one branch of the conversation, and a different model for another branch using Split Mode.

items.question: How does this reduce token cost?
items.answer: By manually excluding irrelevant past messages (context pruning), you send less tokens to the API. Since LLM providers charge by the token input, smaller context windows equal smaller bills.

items.question: Can I export branches?
items.answer: Yes. You can export entire conversations or individual branches, in either JSON (for backup and re-import) or Markdown (for reading and sharing).
